response.overview: Inspired by real life events. A respected psychologist's own demons threaten his stability until a new client, battling Bulimia, forces him to confront his past. Obsessed with saving her, he helps her pursue her dream of singing, but when her anxiety escalates, he must race against time to prevent tragedy.
response.tagline: A respected psychologist's own demons threaten his stability until a new client, battling Bulimia, forces him to confront his past.
response.title: Eating Me Up
